action.reasoning: Observation: New best 0.5889 avg_acc (from 0.4907) with balanced replay(500/task)+KD(T=2)+consolidation(5eps), val~0.5926 matching test; early tasks ~0.46-0.5, late ~0.7-0.8; progressive val gains during training; logging now per-epoch but curves still limited. Analysis: Replay+KD+consolidation effectively combats forgetting vs prior ~0.46 runs; pretrained RN18+adapted conv1 works; bugs in memory/KD/save fixed. Room to improve by tuning (lower lr, more epochs/task, better KD weight/beta+temp, Cosine scheduler, dense train logging every 20 steps for usable curves). Decision: Update train.py with lr=5e-4, epochs_per_task=8, memory=450/task, KD beta=0.4 T=4.0 (weighted loss=ce+beta*kd), CosineAnnealingLR (global), dense logging (train loss+acc every 20 steps, val per epoch), best-model tracking on val. Keep model.py/predict.py. Train then submit_eval targeting ~0.61+.
